description_long: This object consists of three large, rectangular outdoor trash bins arranged side by side, each with a hinged lid and visible wear from outdoor use. The bins are color-coded: green for compostables, blue for recyclables, and black for general waste, with each bin featuring printed labels and signage indicating its intended waste type. The surfaces are slightly dirty and scuffed, suggesting frequent use in an urban environment. The black bin in the center has its lid partially open, revealing black trash bags inside and one bag placed on the ground in front. Each bin has a molded base and a recessed handle area for easy maneuvering, and the blue and green bins display the Recology company logo and waste service information. The overall construction appears to be heavy-duty plastic, designed for durability and outdoor exposure.
description: A set of three large, color-coded outdoor trash bins with hinged lids, visible signage, and signs of heavy use. The bins are labeled for compost, recycling, and general waste, with one bin partially open and trash bags visible.
description_view_0: Front view showing all three bins side by side, with clear labels and a trash bag in front of the black bin.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the blue bin in the foreground, with the lids of all bins visible and a trash bag beside the black bin.
description_view_2: Rear view of the bins, showing the back panels and the blue and green bins flanking the black bin.
description_view_3: Opposite side view with the green bin in the foreground, showing the Recology logo and the side profile of the bins.
attribute_labeling_or_signage: Each bin has printed waste type labels, Recology company logos, and service information; the black bin has a handwritten number.
